text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion and I have come to watch the Arima
Kinen, where Air Shakur is running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ultimately, Air Shakur loses. She explains that
while she was struggling against the conclusion
her data foretold, she found hope watching Fine
Motion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She wanted to use this race to bring about a
different conclusion. But there's no changing Fine
Motion's mind, and everything proceeds as Air
Shakur predicted.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But, by running the race to the end, Air Shakur
has come to accept her path. Likewise, Fine
Motion has a path that's all her own too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We then proceed to our scheduled press
conference, where Fine Motion announces her
return to Ireland. As she speaks, her eyes glisten
with tears...
